title: Fix Internet Identity actor configuration to use authenticated identity

requirements.text: Update the useActor hook (frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts) to create the backend actor using the authenticated identity retrieved from authClient.getIdentity() instead of an anonymous identity. The actor must be rebuilt whenever the authentication state changes, ensuring all canister calls are made with the user's authenticated Internet Identity principal.

quotes: Pastikan actor dibuat menggunakan identity dari AuthClient, bukan anonymous identity.
Gunakan identity dari authClient.getIdentity() saat membuat actor.

acceptanceCriteria: The actor is created using the identity from authClient.getIdentity(), not AnonymousIdentity
The actor is re-created when the authentication state changes (login/logout)
Authenticated canister calls include the user's Internet Identity principal
Unauthenticated state falls back gracefully (e.g., anonymous actor for public calls)
The useActor hook reads the authClient instance from the InternetIdentity context

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts — it is an immutable path
Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts in a way that breaks existing query key invalidation logic
Do not change the backend Motoko actor
nonGoals: Adding new authentication flows or providers
Modifying any public-facing pages or components
